reasoning:
The price of NXPI on the forecast date (2025-10-26) was roughly $217.1. Earnings are expected to be announced on Monday, October 27, 2025 (one day after the knowledge cutoff), which will introduce post-earnings volatility.

The statistical trend model gives a probability of 0.52 from linear modeling and up to 0.59 when considering historical patterns. Stock returns over short horizons (like one week to a few months) are notoriously difficult to predict and approximate a random walk with a very slight upward drift. The upcoming earnings report creates high uncertainty in the extremely short term (the first resolution date is 2025-11-02, which will fully capture the market reaction to the Q3 2025 earnings). Therefore, setting probabilities very close to 0.5 is appropriate for all three dates.

For 2025-11-02 (7 days out): I estimate a 52% probability, as there's a slight equity premium base rate, but earnings make it highly uncertain.
For 2025-11-25 (30 days out): I slightly increase the probability to 53% to reflect the slight upward drift of stock prices over time.
For 2026-01-24 (90 days out): Over the course of 3 months, the positive drift is a bit stronger, pushing the estimate to 55%.
